case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. LEONILA B YPIL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00) SERVED MAR-11-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YPIL, LEONILA B
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,293.18 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT YPIL, LEONILA B ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR-26-2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY (REPRESENTATIVE SOSEFINA FLORES), PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT GRANTED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YPIL, LEONILA B $2,293.18 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,398.18 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
